input.headline: SYSTEMS ARCHITECT &\\nCREATIVE TECHNOLOGIST
input.text: I build worlds that make logic feel human and humanity feel designed.
input.label: EMILE HARMEL

rawText:
Hello. I'm Emile. For the last two decades, my focus has been on the seams—the junction points where brutally efficient backend architecture meets an interface that feels intuitive enough to write poetry with.

I don't just build applications; I engineer ecosystems. My sweet spot is transforming tangled, monolithic pipelines into self-healing, agentic frameworks. Think of it as moving beyond mere coding into true systems orchestration.

If it involves complexity, but it needs to feel graceful in the hands of a user, we should talk.
